name: BJ's Restaurants, Inc.
summary: BJ's Restaurants, Inc. owns and operates casual dining restaurants in the United States. Its restaurants offer pizzas, craft and other beers, appetizers, entr√É¬©es, pastas, sandwiches, specialty salads, and desserts. As of December 29, 2020, the company operated 210 casual dining restaurants in 29 states. BJ's Restaurants, Inc. was founded in 1978 and is headquartered in Huntington Beach, California.
